content: TASK-045 interrupt done: root localhost playground now mirrors the static demo editor ergonomics. index.html has a top Render action, line-number gutter synced with textarea scrolling, and a draggable editor width handle. Browser DOM check on http://127.0.0.1:4174/ confirmed line numbers, resize handle, and panel-top Render placement. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
